    A

    addBoxesFromFile(ElasticsearchClient) - Static method in class kp.util.DatasetManager
    Adds the boxes from the dataset file.

    B

    Box - Record Class in kp.model
    Box record.

    D

    DATASET_FILE - Static variable in class kp.Constants
    The dataset file created in Solr project 'Study15'.
    DatasetManager - Class in kp.util
    The dataset manager.
    DEFAULT_HEADER_FUN - Static variable in class kp.Constants
    The default header function.

    E

    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.

    Returns the value of the fileExtension record component.

    M

    The primary entry point for launching the application.

    W

    WAIT_AFTER_DATASET_IMPORT - Static variable in class kp.Constants
    The sleep time after the dataset import.
